Off Calendar May-20-2008 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status On Administration Of Estate
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Continued To May-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status On Administration Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Continued To May-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Cullen and Burton McGovern for the Co-Administrators.

Mr. McGovern requested a continuance stating that the final distribution could not be done until the taxes were filed, and that he was waiting for the CPA to complete them. In addition, he reported that one of the properties had been sold and that the other estates had been closed. The matter was continued to May 6, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status On Administration Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Continued To Mar-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status On Administration Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-22-2007 Continued To Jan-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: John Cullen and Burton McGovern appearing for administrators. Counsel is working on determinating if the 706 was filed. He is also prepared a 706 based n new evaulations. There is no money in the estate. They will need to sell or refinance the property to pay taxes. Matter is continued to 1/22/08.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Lee.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status On Administration Of Estate
Off Calendar May-23-2007 Continued To Aug-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: John Cullen and Burton McGovern appearing for executor. Counsel is working in the 706 and trying to find money to make payment. They may have to sell the house to make the payment. Matter is continued to 8/22 for status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Petition For Hearing On Objections To Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: John Cullen appearing for moving party. Burton McGovern appearing for James Moyles and Derith Moyles. Shirley Yawitz is not in court.
Opening statement presented by Mr. Cullen. Exhibits marked for identification. James E. Lester sworn and examined. Derith Moyles sworn and examined. All marked exhibits are received in evidence. Court's findings are as to the Pacific Avenue property, $200,000.00 is reasonable and as to the Steiner Street property, $750,000.00 is reasonable. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: D. Handa.

Per diem fees paid. All exhibits are ordered to be returned to counsel. All exhibits are returned to counsl.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status On Administration Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Continued To May-23-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Hearing On Objections To Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Continued To Apr-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: John Cullen appearing for administrators. Shirley Yawitz is in Court. Mr. Cullen requested to have this matter set for evidentiary hearing. Matter is continued to 4/20 for evidentiary hearing.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
